title: Fix missing image, update address, and enhance blurry photo

requirements.text: Identify and fix the empty/missing picture slot in the image gallery on the homepage (frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx) by adding a valid gym facility photo

quotes: looks good its missin a picture thats empty

acceptanceCriteria: All image slots in the gallery display valid photos with no empty placeholders
The added image shows Bodyshape Fitness equipment or facilities

requirements.text: Update the gym address throughout the website to '6424 Taylor Mill Road' including in the Locations page (frontend/src/pages/Locations.tsx), Layout footer (frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx), and any other locations where the address is displayed

quotes: the address is 6424 taylor mill road

acceptanceCriteria: The address '6424 Taylor Mill Road' appears on the Locations page
The address '6424 Taylor Mill Road' appears in the footer contact information
All previous address references are replaced with the correct address

requirements.text: Enhance the quality and sharpness of the first blurry gym facility photo displayed in the image gallery

quotes: the first picture is really blurry and needs enhanced

acceptanceCriteria: The first image in the gallery displays with improved clarity and sharpness
The enhanced image maintains the same subject matter (gym equipment/facilities)
The image quality is visibly improved compared to the current blurry version

constraints: Maintain the existing image gallery layout and functionality
Preserve all other location information (phone number, hours) except the street address
Keep the same visual style and color scheme when adding or enhancing images
nonGoals: Changing the image gallery component structure
Modifying other location details beyond the street address
Adding new images beyond fixing the missing slot and enhancing the blurry photo

required: High-quality gym facility photo showing equipment or interior space to fill the empty gallery slot (gallery-fill.dim_800x600.png)
edits: Enhance sharpness and clarity of the blurry first gallery image (gallery-1.png > gallery-1-enhanced.dim_800x600.png)
